task_completion.description: Check if 'Attention Is All You Need' has its Item Type set to 'Conference Paper'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand metadata pane for 'Attention Is All You Need', the 'Item Type' field should display 'Conference Paper'.

task_completion.description: Check if 'Attention Is All You Need' has the correct Proceedings Title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand metadata pane for 'Attention Is All You Need', the 'Proceedings Title' field should be exactly 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 30'.

task_completion.description: Check if 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' has its Item Type set to 'Conference Paper'.

task_completion.description: Check if 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' has the correct Proceedings Title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand metadata pane for 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition', the 'Proceedings Title' field should be exactly 'Proceedings of the IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition'.

task_completion.description: Check if the Date and Authors fields for the updated entries remain correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand metadata pane for the modified papers, the 'Date' and 'Author' fields should still be populated with their original values (e.g., 2017, 2016, 2014 and the respective authors) and not be deleted or overwritten.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the Zotero GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application window with the metadata pane being edited, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent updated the existing items rather than creating new ones.
integrity.visual_evidence: The central library pane should show only one entry for each of the three papers, indicating they were updated in place.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent didn't just type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be visible within the Zotero application's specific metadata fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating three specific papers in Zotero from 'Report' to 'Conference Paper' and adding their proceedings titles. 1. 'Attention Is All You Need': Proceedings Title = 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 30'. 2. 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition': Proceedings Title = 'Proceedings of the IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition'. 3. 'Generative Adversarial Nets': Proceedings Title = 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 27'. The Date and Authors fields must remain intact. The seed library contains partial author lists (3-4 authors per paper), which is expected and should not be penalized. The VLM should look for these exact strings in the Zotero metadata pane.
